title: NotEnoughHerobrine
description: NotEnoughHerobrine is a Herobrine parody mod with multiple difficulty levels of Herobrine mobs, Herobrine Ore for crafting tools, and random ominous messages.
body:
## NotEnoughHerobrine

**NotEnoughHerobrine** is a playful parody of the overhyped Herobrine mods. Featuring multiple Herobrine mobs, this mod offers a variety of difficulty levels, from weak minions to a powerful Herobrine boss. The mod also introduces **Herobrine Ore**, which can be mined to craft exclusive tools, but no armor.

### Key Features:
- **Herobrine Mobs**: Several Herobrines that look the same but vary in difficulty:
  - **Weak**: 1 HP, 1 attack damage.
  - **Medium**: Standard zombie behavior.
  - **Harder**: Stronger Herobrine variant.
  - **Boss**: A powerful Herobrine with enhanced abilities.
  
- **Herobrine Ore**: Mine it to craft **Herobrine tools** (no armor).
  
- **Sad Face Block**: When clicked, this block breaks and displays a sad message in the chat, adding a touch of absurdity to your Minecraft world.

- **Random Herobrine Chat Messages**: Occasionally, ominous and somewhat funny messages from Herobrine will appear in the chat, giving the mod a mysterious atmosphere.

---

This mod is a funny twist on the classic Herobrine legend, with an emphasis on the absurd and lighthearted side of Herobrine encounters. Whether you're hunting for rare Herobrines or laughing at the odd chat messages, **NotEnoughHerobrine** offers a great time for fans of the parody.
